name: FullSix S.p.A.
summary: FullSix S.p.A. provides digital transformation, data driven marketing, and communication services in Italy and internationally. It also operates Orchestra, an Internet of Things platform. In addition, the company engages in the online video and TV production activities; and designing, planning, and approving networks and mobile terminals. FullSix S.p.A. was founded in 1988 and is based in Milan, Italy. FullSix S.p.A. is a subsidiary of Orizzonti Holding S.p.A.
